summary: Complete e2e testing of react-leaflet map feature on Expansion page with chapter_type, lat/lng fields for college/high school chapters
passed_tests: GET /api/chapters returns all 10 chapters with chapter_type, lat, lng fields
5 college chapters with correct coordinates (UT Austin, Texas A&M, Rice, Baylor, U of Houston)
5 high school chapters with correct coordinates (Prosper, Bridgeland, Wylie, Round Rock, Travis)
Admin can create new chapter with lat/lng/chapter_type - tested with TEST_TCU Chapter
Admin can update chapter lat/lng and chapter_type
All coordinates verified to be within Texas boundaries
Expansion page (/committees/expansion) loads with Leaflet map showing Texas
Map shows 10 markers at correct positions
College markers are dark/navy colored (larger circles)
High School markers are burnt orange colored (smaller circles)
Map legend shows 'College Chapters' and 'High School Chapters'
Clicking marker shows popup with chapter name, location, and type
College Chapters section dynamically shows 5 college chapter cards from API
High School Chapters section dynamically shows 5 HS chapter cards from API
Admin panel Chapters tab has all required fields: Chapter Name, University/School, Location, Chapter Type (select), Latitude, Longitude, Founding Date, Leadership, Description, Sign-up Link
Full CRUD verified: created chapter appeared on map with new marker, deleted chapter removed marker
seed_data_creation: TEST_TCU Chapter was created and deleted during testing - cleanup completed successfully
context_for_next_testing_agent: react-leaflet map feature fully working on Expansion page. Map uses CARTO light tiles with custom DivIcon markers (dark navy for college, burnt orange for high school). All 10 chapters have correct lat/lng coordinates. Admin panel has chapter_type select dropdown and lat/lng text fields. Chapter CRUD operations with new fields work correctly.
